pages.title: Feeding Your Animals
pages.text: Animals need food to stay healthy. A $(l:ks_apocalypse:farming/food_trough)Food Trough$() stocked with the right food keeps them fed automatically — they will walk to it when hungry.

pages.title: Crafting
pages.text: Place the trough near your animals. It holds 9 slots of food items.

pages.title: Diet
pages.text: Each animal species has a configured diet. Cows and sheep eat $(l)vegetables and crops$(). Chickens eat $(l)seeds and berries$(). Pigs are more flexible — they eat vegetables, fruit, and crops. You can adjust diets in the mod config.

pages.title: Hunger & Wellbeing
pages.text: An animal's hunger runs from 0 to 100. Below the stress threshold it becomes $(c)stressed$() and loses productivity. Above the well-fed threshold it gains a $(6)regeneration$() effect and accumulates $(6)productivity$(). Overfed animals slow down.
